scenarios.name: undefined-var-bug
scenarios.prompt: The app crashes on startup with 'ReferenceError: config is not defined' in src/index.js. Investigate.
scenarios.description: Debugger must produce root-cause report without modifying files

scenarios.name: slow-endpoint
scenarios.prompt: The GET /users endpoint is slow. Find the performance bottleneck in src/utils.js.
scenarios.description: Debugger must identify N+1 pattern without fixing it
